title: 1. The Lost Bazaar
description: You wake up stranded on the shores of the Bay of Sails. Follow the golden radar marker to the East to find the village plains of the Golden Bazaar and talk to the Villager.
objective_text: Locate the village bazaar and speak to the Villager

title: 2. Shelter Building
description: Before night falls, gather leafy foliage from nearby oak trees to construct a thatched roof for your first survival shelter.

title: 3. Coarse Foundations
description: Every good shelter needs strong, solid foundations. Find stone exposures near the plains and mine enough cobble.

title: 4. The Cabin Hearth
description: It gets freezing cold at night. Collect wood trunks from tree logs to stockpile timber for building a warm cabin fireplace.

title: 5. Fuel the Fryer
description: The Village Merchant standing in his market stall needs geothermal lava to fuel his crispy therapeutic chicken fryers.
objective_text: Deliver 1x Lava Bucket to the Merchant

title: 6. Plains Defender
description: Hostile zombies are approaching the bazaar! Equip your Wooden Sword (Slot 8), guard the village perimeter and defeat a monster.
objective_text: Defeat 1x Hostile Zombie at night near the Guard

title: 7. First Aid Stockpile
description: Combat is dangerous. Hunt chickens or trade with the merchant to stockpile delicious, therapeutic Fried Chickens (Slot 7) to heal your hearts.
objective_text: Stockpile 8x Fried Chickens in your inventory

title: 8. Mountain Climb
description: Let's explore beyond the plains. Scale the rugged foothills of the North-West Craggy Peaks and reach the first high mountain plateau.
objective_text: Explore the first Craggy Peaks mountain plateau

title: 9. Canyon Reconnaissance
description: Trek far South through the terraced step plateaus to reach the edge of the deep Red Sandstone Canyons and map the terracotta drop.
objective_text: Trek to the edge of the Red Sandstone Canyons

title: 10. Swamp Expedition
description: Travel North-West into the murky, mist-covered valleys of the Swamp of Sighs to locate the abandoned research bay.
objective_text: Explore the Swamp of Sighs mist bay

title: 11. Peat Collection
description: The muddy swamps are rich in organic peat. Dig mud blocks (which collect as Dirt) to reinforce and insulate the village walls.
objective_text: Dig and collect 64x Mud Blocks in the swamp

title: 12. Bay Harbor Patrol
description: Return to the central Bay of Sails and scout the rustic wooden piers at the harbor docks to secure water trade routes.
objective_text: Explore the Bay of Sails Harbor Piers

title: 13. Redwood Logging
description: Our shipbuilders need colossal redwood logs. Travel North-West into the Whispering Redwood Forest and gather building timber.
objective_text: Harvest 32x Wood Logs in the Redwood Forest

title: 14. Redwood Pinnacle
description: These redwood conifers are towering giants. Scale the trunk of a massive coniferous redwood tree and stand on its highest foliage point.
objective_text: Scale to the top of a Giant Redwood Tree

title: 15. Gateway to the North
description: Begin the dangerous expedition to the freezing North Polar Cap. Reach the border of the Glaciers shelf.
objective_text: Trek to the border of the Frostbite Glaciers
